birthsigns.name: Apprentice
birthsigns.group: The Apprentice's Season is Sun's Height.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Apprentice are thought to have an affinity for magic, but also a vulnerability to magic.
birthsigns.bonus: Magic weakness increased by 25%, magicka regenerates an extra 5 per second, spells are 20% cheaper.
bonusDetails: Magicka regenerates an extra 5 per second.

birthsigns.name: Atronach
birthsigns.group: The Atronach is one of the Mage's Charges. Its season is Sun's Dusk.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Atronach are thought to be natural sorcerers with deep reserves of magicka, but that cannot generate their own magicka.
birthsigns.bonus: Magicka increases by 300, do not lose magicka when hit, absorb chance increased by 25%, you cannot naturally regenerate magicka.
bonusDetails: Do not lose magicka when hit.

birthsigns.name: Lady
birthsigns.group: The Lady is one of the Warrior's Charges and her Season is Heartfire.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Lady are thought to be kind and tolerant.
birthsigns.bonus: Health and Magicka increase by 40 and regenerate 80% faster, you can run or swim without exertion.

birthsigns.name: Lord
birthsigns.group: The Lord's Season is First Seed and he oversees all of Tamriel during the planting.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Lord are thought to be stronger and healthier, although they are sometimes referred to as Trollkin due to their innate weakness to fire.
birthsigns.bonus: Gain 15% Magic Resist and 150 armor rating, restore 1.5 health per second, gain 30% Weakness to Fire.

birthsigns.name: Lover
birthsigns.group: The Lover is one of the Thief's Charges and her season is Sun's Dawn.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Lover are thought to be graceful and passionate.
birthsigns.bonus: 25% chance to take half damage, prices are 15% better. Shouts are 20% stronger.

birthsigns.name: Mage
birthsigns.group: The Mage is a Guardian Constellation whose Season is Rain's Hand when magicka was first used by men.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Mage are thought to have more magicka and a talent for spellcasting.
birthsigns.bonus: Magicka increases by 150. Spells are 30% stronger and longer lasting when over 50% magicka.
bonusDetails: Spells are 30% stronger and longer lasting when over 50% magicka.

birthsigns.name: Ritual
birthsigns.group: The Ritual is one of the Mage's Charges and its Season is Morning Star.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Ritual are thought to have various abilities depending on the aspects of the moons and planets.
birthsigns.bonus: Soul Gems restore 50% more charge. Daedric and Divine blessings are 50% stronger. Standing Stones effects are 200% stronger.
bonusDetails: Daedric and Divine blessings are 50% stronger.

birthsigns.name: Serpent
birthsigns.group: The Serpent wanders about in the sky and has no Season, though its motions are predictable to a degree.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Serpent are thought to have no characteristics in common except being the most blessed and the most cursed.
birthsigns.bonus: Armor penetration with all weapons is increased by 15, poison deals 50% less damage to you, most paralysis effects don't adversely affect you, you receive Serpent's Curse power.

birthsigns.name: Shadow
birthsigns.group: The Shadow's Season is Second Seed.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Shadow are thought to have the ability to hide in shadows.
birthsigns.bonus: You are 50% harder to detect, you can sneak without proficiency, movement noise is 30% quieter, you receive Moonshadow power.

birthsigns.name: Steed
birthsigns.group: The Steed is one of the Warrior's Charges, and her Season is Mid Year.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Steed are thought to be impatient and always hurrying from one place to another.
birthsigns.bonus: Movement is 10 percent faster and 20 percent when sprinting, stamina increased by 60, restore 1 stamina per second, most slow effects don't affect you.
bonusDetails: Movement is 10 percent faster and 20 percent when sprinting.
Most slow effects don't affect you.

birthsigns.name: Thief
birthsigns.group: The Thief is the last Guardian Constellation, and her Season is the darkest month of Evening Star.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Thief are thought to take risks and evade harm. Their luck is thought to run out eventually, cutting their lives short.
birthsigns.bonus: Pickpocketing is 50% easier, you are 40% harder to detect, move 20% faster when sneaking and can sneak without proficiency, 20% chance to avoid physical damage, 1% chance to take 50% more.
bonusDetails: Move 20% faster when sneaking and can sneak without proficiency.

birthsigns.name: Tower
birthsigns.group: The Tower is one of the Thief's Charges and its Season is Frostfall.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Tower are thought to have a knack for finding gold and opening locks.
birthsigns.bonus: Gain more gold when killing enemies, 50 more carryweight, lockpicking expertise is increased by 4, you can pick effortless locks in plain sight without being noticed, reflect 15% physical damage.
bonusDetails: Gain more gold when killing enemies.

birthsigns.name: Warrior
birthsigns.group: The Warrior is the first Guardian Constellation and he protects his charges during their Seasons. The Warrior's own season is Last Seed when his Strength is needed for the harvest.
birthsigns.description: Those born under the sign of the Warrior are thought to be short-tempered and skilled with weapons.
birthsigns.bonus: Health increases by 60, all weapons deal 10% more damage, armor penetration with all weapons is increased by 10 unarmed strikes do 10 additional damage.
